days.summary: ByteDance Seed officially launched Seed 2.0 and also exposed a Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview build on Arena, marking the clearest product artifact in the current set. Anthropic changed Claude Code economics by requiring extra payment for third-party harness usage such as OpenClaw starting April 4, while AgentScope 1.0 and VibeVoice surfaced as notable new research artifacts but without the benchmark evidence needed to rank them as clear breakthroughs.
